title: Thallium
description: Yet another modpack that adds many client-side features/tweaks while increasing performance and remaining compatible with vanilla servers.
body:
# Thallium
Thallium is yet another modpack that adds many client-side features/tweaks while increasing performance, remaining compatible with vanilla servers and frequently updating.

Thallium is 100% compatible with vanilla worlds, servers and mechanics.

![There are 15 competing standards.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9db8b5ff43ee4f3027f40f0e29c5a3d87291230_0.webp)

- Mods marked with ⭐ are considered important or extra good.
- Mods marked with ⚠️ could get you banned from servers that disallow that mod.

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers): Makes skin layers render in 3D.
- ⭐ **[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin): Provides information about food and shows your saturation.**
- [Armor HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-hud): Shows information about your armour on the HUD.
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud): Improves the HUD when riding an entity.
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats): Improves the statistics menu.
- [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus): Improves the vanilla blur effect.
- [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation): Adds an animation when chat messages appear.
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads): Shows the player's head next to their chat messages.
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds): Allows you to favourite/pin worlds and servers.
- ⭐ **[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling): Adds a search bar to the key binds menu.**
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders): Allows you to play in borderless/windowed fullscreen mode.
- ⭐ **[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons): Allows you to see very far but is disabled by default.**
- [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions): Adds descriptions to enchantment books.
- [facebar](https://modrinth.com/mod/facebar): Adds the player's head on the locator bar instead of boring colours.
- ⚠️ _[Full Brightness Toggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-brightness-toggle): Adds the ability to press `F7` to toggle fullbright._
- ⭐ **[Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next): Adds inventory sorting.**
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload): Redesigns the language menu and improves the performance of loading languages.
- [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop): Makes bubbles pop when they reach the surface of the water.
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix): Removes tiny gaps that you can see in items when you're holding them.
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory): Allows you to scroll up in the chat.
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks): Makes it easier to move items in the inventory with the mouse.
- ⭐ **[Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify): Adds the ability to download resource packs, shader packs and worlds from Modrinth and Curseforge in-game.**
- [Server Country Flags](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-country-flags): Shows what country servers are located in inside of the multiplayer menu.
- ⭐ **[Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip): Allows you to see the contents of a shulker box without placing it down.**
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered): Makes sounds more realistic.
- [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars): Adds progress bars to status effects to see how long they will last.
- ⭐⚠️ **_[ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus): Allows you to join servers on older versions of Minecraft._**
- ⭐⚠️ **_[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap): Adds a minimap to the top left of your screen that can be toggled with `Right ALT`._**
- ⭐⚠️ **_[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map): Adds a fullscreen map that you can open by pressing `M`._**

</details>




<details>
<summary>Features from OptiFine</summary>

- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes): Allows you to use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and MinecraftCapes.
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity): Adds support for OptiFine's connected textures, emissive textures and custom block layers.
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves): Adds the Smart Leaves feature from OptiFine. Use Puzzle to enable this.
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features): Adds support for OptiFine's custom entity models.
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures): Adds support for many custom entity texture features.
- ⭐ **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris): Adds support for shader packs.**
- [LambdaBetterGrass](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass): Adds OptiFine's better grass. Use Puzzle to enable this.
- ⭐ **[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights): Adds OptiFine's dynamic lights. Use Puzzle to enable this.**
- [Optiboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/optiboxes): Adds support for OptiFine skies.
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui): Enables customisation of GUI with resource packs
- ⭐ **[Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle): Adds a button in the options screen to configure mods that add OptiFine features.**
- ⭐ **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify): Adds the ability to hold `C` to zoom in.**

</details>


<details>
<summary>Performance Mods</summary>

- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps): Groups XP orbs together.
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric): Uses multiple CPU threads to improve the speed of chunk generation.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps): Reduces Minecraft's resource usage while Minecraft isn't focused.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling): Stops entities that can't be seen from being rendered.
- [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping): Improves speed of pinging servers when using a literal IP address.
- ⭐ **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core): Reduces memory usage.**
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast): Improves speed of immediate mode rendering.
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton): Optimises the networking stack.
- ⭐ **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium): Optimises many different game mechanics.**
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling): Improves performance of culling.
- ⭐ **[ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux): Re-writes the lighting engine to be faster.**
- ⭐ **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium): Re-writes the rendering engine and gives huge performance gains.**
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric): Improves performance on servers with a lot of players connected.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- [Chat Reporting Helper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chat-reporting-helper): Simply explains chat reporting.
- ⭐ **[Unique Dark Refined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-refined): Adds dark mode.**
- [Even Better Enchants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants): Adds unique item icons for every enchantment book.
- [Low On Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-on-fire): Makes fire smaller on your screen.
- [Small Shield & Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-shield-totem): Makes the shield and totem of undying smaller.
- [Translations for Sodium](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium): Adds more language support for Sodium.


</details>
